explanations.11: This pipes the list of container names into a loop, reading one name at a time into the variable `name`.
explanations.12: This gets detailed info about the container, converts it to JSON format, then uses `jq` (a JSON parser tool) to extract just the health status value.
explanations.20: This checks if the status is NOT equal to 'null', meaning the container has a health check configured but it's not healthy (so we color it red).
